reviews.name: Guadalupe Lopez
reviews.reviewText: Amazing nails experience! JoJany is incredibly talented and made sure I was happy with every detail. My nails came out perfect. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Yesenia Sanchez
reviews.reviewText: So kind and welcoming! Her hair work is absolutely stunning. She really listens to what you want and delivers beyond expectations. Love this studio!

reviews.name: Kaylee
reviews.reviewText: She gave me the most beautiful Barbie beach girl look! Exactly what I envisioned. JoJany is a true artist. I won't go anywhere else!

reviews.name: Janet d
reviews.reviewText: Total vibe, she never disappoints! Every single visit is better than the last. The studio atmosphere is amazing and her work is always flawless.

reviews.name: Gloria Jimenez
reviews.reviewText: She goes above and beyond every time! JoJany truly cares about her clients and it shows in her work. My nails have never looked this good!

reviews.name: Daniela castillo
reviews.reviewText: ¡Excelente trabajo y muy carismática! Hace que te sientas como en casa. Su trabajo es de primera calidad y siempre sale uno feliz. 100% recomendada.

reviews.name: Olivia Tate
reviews.reviewText: She exceeded all my expectations! I came in with a reference photo and she matched it perfectly. The quality of her work is outstanding. Book her now!

reviews.name: Maryjane Munoz
reviews.reviewText: Amazing work and amazing energy! JoJany makes every appointment so fun and relaxing. You can tell she genuinely loves what she does. Best in the area!

reviews.name: Anel Brito Ramirez
reviews.reviewText: ¡Excelente servicio! Muy profesional y atenta a los detalles. Mis uñas quedaron increíbles y el ambiente del estudio es muy acogedor. La recomiendo ampliamente.

reviews.name: Yajaira Dominguez
reviews.reviewText: She gave me the most perfect layered cut! JoJany really understands hair and knows exactly what will look best for your face shape. Obsessed with my hair!
